calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2004 Continued To Oct-25-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by the Defendant: Danny Herzog.
10:00 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Damon Harris, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Three day notice dtd. 8-26-04-----------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at 3048 16th Street, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $955.50
Costs per cost bill, for a total of $955.50
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN ZANGHI FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION. AGENT DAMON HARRIS ALSO PRESENT
NON APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DANNY HERZOG

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.

JUDGE:OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
